reviews.review_description:
￼￼ the first two missions ￼were fun but it’s dumb how you have to get premium  to play the third mission 
￼￼
Good graphics design! Easy to Understand what I do with the ships! Controls and maintenance are too good

OMA War delivers an action-packed open-world experience with a thrilling combination of land-based combat and intense water ship battles. Set in a dynamic environment, players can freely explore vast terrains, engage in enemy firefights, and command powerful watercraft in adrenaline-fueled sea combat. If you're a fan of military shooters, naval warfare, and open-world missions, OMA War Free Version offers an excellent taste of action with lots of replay value. Whether you're storming bases or launching sea raids, every battle feels rewarding.
It was ok until it wanted you to spend money to keep going I don’t think it is worth it don’t get it trust me.

developer_response.body:
Hello! darkknightrider0,
Thanks for review, Yes Actually this is FREE game with some features, for more missions you have to get premium version available on store.

reviews.review_description: Nothing works it need a lot of work and dont get the game trust me

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We sincerely appreciate your feedback. To help us address your concerns better, could you please provide more details about the issues you’re experiencing? For example, is the challenge related to downloading, installation, or gameplay?

Our team extensively tests the game to ensure a smooth experience, but we're here to help if anything went wrong. Please feel free to reach out to our support team at [support email]. We’re committed to resolving your issues and improving your experience.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we hope to assist you further!

reviews.review_description: I never got past the first scenario because to finish it, the player has to destroy the boat. The tutorial says to use the "A" button to fire the cannon, but the "A" button does nothing. Everything else works like steering the boat and using the gun.  I liked the concept of the game and was looking forward to enjoying it. I have a quest 2. I hope you can fix the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. I think you missed that 'A' Button works while holding the shooting gear. Once you hold and press 'A' button it would work perfectly.  Thanks for review again. We keep working on the game to make it better.

reviews.review_title: Awful when you are on an island
reviews.review_description: The combat with part of the game is kind of fun. When you are on an island between missions, the game is awful. You can't turn on smooth rotation and smooth locomotion, and there is a constant, very annoying, and basic stock sound of ducks quacking.
Different,  addictive...  A must try!  Operating a boat.  I'm older... thinking of PT-109 and JFK.  Operating a PT and firing cannons.  How can you beat that?
BUT you can only do 3 missions that’s STUPID

developer_response.body:
Hello! Maisyn,

Actually, It is a Free Version, You can get more missions and features in Paid Version, Please check for 'OMA war' a Paid Version. I hope you will have lot fun there. Thanks.
